productDisplayName: Fossil Men Midway Intl Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this Midway Intl wallet from fossil is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. Fossil perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes with its classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Comes in a vintage style tin.Dimensions: 12 cm x 10 cmOne main compartment on a textured upper with embossed branding and mesh liningOne slip pockets for coins on the leftA flap on the left side with five card holder slots on one side and a mesh id slot on the otherFive card holder slots under the flapOne buttonable pocket on the right with brand badgeCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
